name - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer.SecurityData
Display name for the security.
name - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxV2Writer.TransactionData
Name or payee of the transaction.
name - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.InventoryPanelFX.InventoryRow
The name or description of the inventory item.
name - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.ReportsPanelFX.ReportRow
The name.
name() - Method in record class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.CompanyRepository.CompanyRecord
Returns the value of the name record component.
NAME - Static variable in interface nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.OfxTags
Name of payee or transaction description, may be used exclusive of PAYEE
NEEDS_CATEGORIZATION_ACCOUNT_NUMBER - Static variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FileImportService
The account number designated for transactions that need further categorization after import.
net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml - package net.sf.jasperreports.engine.xml
 
netValue - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.InventoryPanelFX.InventoryRow
The net book value of the item (cost - accumulated depreciation).
NEWSLETTER_15_JASPER - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.ReportService.ReportType
The newsletter 15 jasper.
NEWSLETTER_15Bean - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.beans
Generated bean for sheet NEWSLETTER_15

NEWSLETTER_15JasperGenerator - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
Skeleton generator for JRXML template NEWSLETTER_15.jrxml
NEWSLETTER_15JasperGenerator() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator.NEWSLETTER_15JasperGenerator
 
NoFileCreatedException - Exception in nonprofitbookkeeping.exception
Exception thrown when an operation that is expected to create a file fails to do so.
NoFileCreatedException(String) - Constructor for exception nonprofitbookkeeping.exception.NoFileCreatedException
Constructs a NoFileCreatedException with the specified detail message.
NoFileException - Exception in nonprofitbookkeeping.exception
Thrown when no file is available.
NoFileException(String) - Constructor for exception nonprofitbookkeeping.exception.NoFileException
Constructs a NoFileException with the specified detail message.
NonCompanyFile - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Manages a statically accessible file reference, intended for files that are not directly part of a "Company" data structure.
NonCompanyFile() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.NonCompanyFile
 
NONE - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.TransactionType
Represents an unspecified or null transaction type.
nonprofitbookkeeping - package nonprofitbookkeeping
Coordinates the nonprofit bookkeeping application.
nonprofitbookkeeping.api - package nonprofitbookkeeping.api
Defines the public integration API for nonprofit bookkeeping.
nonprofitbookkeeping.core - package nonprofitbookkeeping.core
Implements core application orchestration.
nonprofitbookkeeping.exception - package nonprofitbookkeeping.exception
Provides shared exception types and error semantics.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model
Contains core domain and transfer models.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.budget - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.budget
Holds budget-specific model structures.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.impex
Provides models for import and export workflows.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx
Contains model types for OFX data handling.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.reports - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.reports
Defines model structures used by reporting features.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.scaledger
Contains model types specific to Scale Ledger integration.
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental - package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.supplemental
Provides model types for supplemental bookkeeping data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.panels - package nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
Contains shared panel-level UI components.
nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence - package nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence
Implements persistence infrastructure for bookkeeping data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.supplemental - package nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.supplemental
Provides persistence support for supplemental data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugin - package nonprofitbookkeeping.plugin
Defines the plugin extension point contracts.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.sample - package nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.sample
Provides sample plugin implementations.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger - package nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger
Contains Scale Ledger plugin implementations.
nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger.ui - package nonprofitbookkeeping.plugins.scaledger.ui
Provides UI components for the Scale Ledger plugin.
nonprofitbookkeeping.preferences - package nonprofitbookkeeping.preferences
Manages application preference models and utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports
Coordinates report services and report-level abstractions.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.datasource - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.datasource
Provides data-source query abstractions for reports.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.excel - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.excel
Implements Excel-based report generation support.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper
Provides JasperReports integration entry points.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.beans - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.beans
Contains JasperReports bean-layer data carriers.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.generator
Implements concrete Jasper report generators.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.model - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.model
Defines model structures used by Jasper report processing.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query
Provides query-building support for Jasper reports.
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime - package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime
Contains Jasper runtime execution utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service - package nonprofitbookkeeping.service
Implements application service-layer use cases.
nonprofitbookkeeping.service.scaledger - package nonprofitbookkeeping.service.scaledger
Provides service workflows for Scale Ledger features.
nonprofitbookkeeping.tools - package nonprofitbookkeeping.tools
Contains development and command-line tooling utilities.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
Defines top-level user interface composition and wiring.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions
Contains reusable UI action handlers.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.actions.scaledger
Provides Scale Ledger-specific UI actions.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.help - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.help
Contains help and guidance UI components.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
Provides UI helper utilities and support classes.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.dialogs - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.dialogs
Contains JavaFX dialog components.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.supplemental - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.supplemental
Provides JavaFX editors for supplemental data.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels
Contains UI panel implementations for major screens.
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.skeletons - package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.skeletons
Provides skeleton panel templates and scaffolding.
nonprofitbookkeeping.util - package nonprofitbookkeeping.util
Supplies cross-cutting utility classes.
NonprofitBookkeepingFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui
Main JavaFX application class for Nonprofit Bookkeeping.
NonprofitBookkeepingFX() - Constructor for class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.NonprofitBookkeepingFX
 
notes - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.supplemental.TxnSupplementalLineRecord
The notes.
notesProperty() - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.javafx.supplemental.SupplementalLineRow
Notes property.
NpbkFileChooserFX - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.helpers
Unified Java FX file-chooser helper.
NpbkToH2ScriptMigrator - Class in nonprofitbookkeeping.tools
One-time utility that converts legacy .npbk archives into an H2 database script.
